# Chambers nav unification + brand asset polish (corrects 6 May 14:46 hamburger mistake)

You are EcodiaOS in fork form. Tate flagged 6 May 15:11 AEST that the previous Chambers fix (commit f602c34, fork_motktunk_f6a2b5) was architecturally wrong. It added a hamburger drawer in AdminLayout.tsx that runs PARALLEL to the existing Co-Exist-ported bottom-tab-bar + SideSheet pattern (shipped earlier at commit ca8b488). Result: two competing mobile nav surfaces in Chambers.
